description_long: This object is a bolt-action rifle with a long, slender barrel and a prominent bolt handle on the right side. The receiver and trigger assembly are compact, with a visible trigger guard and a straight bolt lever. The rifle lacks a visible stock, making it appear incomplete or possibly disassembled. The barrel is unadorned, with no visible muzzle device or attachments, and the iron sights are basic and integrated into the barrel and receiver. The overall finish is dark, likely blued or parkerized steel, giving it a matte, non-reflective appearance. The rifle's design is utilitarian, with minimal embellishments and a focus on function.
description: A bolt-action rifle with a long, slender barrel, compact receiver, and no visible stock, finished in a dark matte metal.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the barrel, bolt handle, and trigger assembly.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel and the alignment of the receiver and bolt.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, displaying the bolt handle and trigger assembly from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the bolt handle and the back of the receiver.
